name: Mousse Au Chocolat (2)
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon rum or 1/2 teaspoon vanilla extract
recipeInstructions:
1. Break the chocolate into pieces and place it in a small saucepan with the water or black coffee. Stir continuously over gentle heat until melted, thick, and creamy. Using a double boiler can help prevent scorching.
2. Remove from heat and stir in the butter and flavoring (rum or vanilla extract).
3. Separate the eggs: put the whites in a small bowl and gently fold the yolks into the chocolate mixture one at a time, stirring well after each addition.
4. Beat the egg whites until they form soft peaks, then carefully fold them into the chocolate mixture.
5. Pour the batter into serving dishes and chill overnight.
6. When ready to serve, whip the cream and spoon a portion on top of each dish.
Note: The original recipe text contains an attribution line and notes that should not be included in the edited version.
